reviews.review_title: Surprisingly Fun Tank Battles in VR!
reviews.review_description: I wasn’t expecting much, but WarZone Tank Arena VR is a blast! The tank controls feel great in VR, and the combat is intense and satisfying. It’s easy to jump into and hard to put down. If you’re into VR shooters or vehicle combat, definitely give it a shot.

Aiming system is so janky, and when you shoot, it doesn't even know where to shoot and where to land, I shot acid rain directly at tank, and it teleport 10 meters behind me. Another time my shot teleported underneath the map and fell for ages, had to quit app to restart. Bad game, don't waste your money on it.
